name: @lacqjs/nuxt-dict
description: Nuxt 数据字典模块，提供扁平/树形字典翻译、多语言国际化、三级缓存与 SSR 预取。

scripts.cleanup: (pnpx nuxt cleanup || npx nuxt cleanup) && pnpx rimraf .nuxt .output dist node_modules .data
scripts.clean:install: pnpm run cleanup && pnpm run docs:cleanup && pnpm run playground:cleanup && pnpm install
scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:prepare && nuxi dev playground
scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxi prepare playground
scripts.docs:cleanup: pnpx rimraf docs/.nuxt docs/.output docs/dist docs/node_modules docs/.data
scripts.playground:cleanup: pnpx rimraf playground/.nuxt playground/.output playground/dist playground/node_modules
scripts.release: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm prepack && changelogen --release && pnpm publish && git push origin dev --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm prepack && changelogen --release --major && pnpm publish && git push origin dev --follow-tags
scripts.release:e2e: pnpm lint && pnpm e2e && pnpm typecheck && pnpm prepack && changelogen --release && pnpm publish && git push origin dev --follow-tags
scripts.release:e2e:major: pnpm lint && pnpm e2e && pnpm typecheck && pnpm prepack && changelogen --release --major && pnpm publish && git push origin dev --follow-tags
